one_line: Classified all 51 CIDG generated incidents into simple/cascade/novel (reusing A7 difficulty + A8 novelty sidecars + registry.json; 19 unregistered handled by deterministic fallback) and rendered 3 separate stratified pass@k tables from real A1/A2 results; T8 parity 105/105 exact vs A1, 0 classifier-vs-result mismatches.
